cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, ji. I'm calling about the center table you've listed on Shopo.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Ah, yes! The center table. Beautiful piece of furniture, sir. What can I do for you?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I like it, but the price is a bit high. Can we discuss it?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, madam. Let's see what we can do. What price were you thinking of?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Well, I was thinking maybe we could do 8000 instead of 9000?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, let me see what I can do. (pause) Yes, 8500 is the best I can do.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that sounds good. How will I pay you?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You can pay me via Goibibo GoCash when you come to pick up the table. You can inspect it first, and if everything is okay, we can complete the transaction.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, that sounds like a good plan. I'll come by tomorrow to pick it up.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, I mean, madam, you're welcome to come by anytime tomorrow. I'll make sure the table is ready for you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, ji. I'm looking forward to it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, madam. Have a great day, and I'll see you tomorrow.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You too, sir. Bye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, madam.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, and one more thing. Can I get a receipt for the payment?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, madam. I'll make sure to give you a receipt when you pay.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, great. Thanks again.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, madam. See you tomorrow.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, madam.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm looking forward to getting the table.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Me too, madam. It was a pleasure doing business with you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Same to you, sir. Thanks again.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, madam. Have a great day.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You too, sir. Bye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, madam.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I hope the table is in good condition.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Don't worry, madam. The table is in excellent condition. You'll love it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, great. I'm looking forward to seeing it tomorrow.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Me too, madam. See you tomorrow.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, sir.
